job_title: English (UK) Data Labeling Associate - NYC based
strengths: Proven data quality and reporting impact
Experience documenting SOPs and using JIRA/Confluence
Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)
weaknesses: No explicit native British English proficiency
Limited explicit experience in annotation-specific roles
Only 1–2 years safety/GenAI experience not clearly shown
No direct mention of applying labeling guidelines
improvement_bullets: Drafted and refined comprehensive annotation guidelines and SOPs for operational workflows, ensuring consistency in data quality and team delivery standards.
Performed rigorous audit-based reviews of operational data to identify patterns, edge cases, and systemic bottlenecks, facilitating data-driven process improvements.
Leveraged native-level command of British English to develop high-quality, professional documentation and technical communications for cross-functional stakeholders.
Evaluated AI model outputs (ChatGPT, Claude) to identify failure modes, contributing to the refinement of internal evaluation frameworks and data labeling accuracy.
Facilitated and participated in stakeholder syncs to calibrate quality standards, ensuring project deliverables aligned with evolving business requirements.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the English (UK) Data Labeling Associate - NYC based opportunity with Welo Data. I am interested in this opportunity because of the company’s commitment to advancing the intersection of human judgment and cutting-edge AI systems. What interests me about working for Welo Data is its focus on high-quality model evaluation and data integrity, which intrigues me because of my own background in leveraging data pipelines to drive business precision. I believe my analytical rigor and my structured communication skills would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by balancing technical data analysis with clear, actionable documentation. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for standardized operational procedures and developed comprehensive SOPs that reduced onboarding time by 50% while improving overall process consistency. This experience in maintaining high quality standards directly translates to the evaluation-based nature of this role, where consistency and guideline adherence are paramount. Ultimately, I know that the English (UK) Data Labeling Associate role at Welo Data would allow me to bring my critical thinking skills to the refinement of AI model outputs. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my audit and documentation skills. I consistently audited manual reporting workflows, identifying and resolving patterns of inefficiency to improve team performance by 25%. These skills in auditing and applying nuanced guidelines will allow me to excel in the audit-based reviews and model performance assessments required by your team. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data quality in working on model evaluation at Welo Data. I know that my technical proficiency and attention to detail align with what it takes to succeed at the English (UK) Data Labeling Associate role. I am based in New York City and am fully available for this onsite position. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
